title: negundo cochinchinense
intro: Negundo cochinchinense, also known as the Nees' Neem or Chinese Neem, is a plant species belonging to the Meliaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various medicinal applications due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which help in treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits associated with Negundo cochinchinense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate skin conditions, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal practices, Negundo cochinchinense is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is used to treat various ailments, including skin infections, digestive issues, and wounds.
